chapter_title.ar: باب صِفَةِ الْغُسْلِ وَ الْوُضُوءِ قَبْلَهُ وَ بَعْدَهُ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَغْتَسِلُ فِي مَكَانٍ غَيْرِ طَيِّبٍ وَ مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ وَ تَحْوِيلِ الْخَاتَمِ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – Description of the washing, and the Ablution (Wudhu) before it and after it, and the man washing in a place other than good, and what is to be said during the washing, and turning of the ring during the washing

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/132)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/132)
text: يُفِيضُ الْجُنُبُ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ الْمَاءَ ثَلَاثاً لَا يُجْزِئُهُ أَقَلُّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabi’e Bin Abdullah,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one with sexual impurity should pour the water upon his head, three times, any less than that would not suffice him’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Rib‘i ibn ‘Abd Allah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One, because of sexual relation, must pour water on one’s head three times. Less than this is not sufficient.’”
